title: anthemis parnassica
intro: Anthemis parnassica, also known as Mountain Chamomile, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its essential oil, which contains chamazulene and other sesquiterpene lactones, offering anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Anthemis parnassica include soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting restful sleep, making it a popular natural remedy for various health concerns. Herbal preparations of Anthemis parnassica include teas, tinctures, and topical creams, allowing for various applications and dosages to suit individual needs.
